assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 7 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Celeste Maloy. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 1 security-frame hit, 3 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 7 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-16T23:08:13Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
